summary: P2 — Graduated Trust full backend+frontend testing PASSED. 11/11 new backend API assertions in test_aggregator_trust_api.py pass; 4/4 existing isolation assertions in test_aggregator_trust.py still pass (regression OK). Frontend UI verified: Sources Trust column with badge / counters / threshold hint, Edit dialog Graduated trust section with mode select + threshold input persists, Reset-trust button confirms+zeroes counters. APSC + SLPRB sources preserved; all TEST_ data cleaned.
critical_code_review_comments: aggregator.py: TRUST_MIN_DECISIONS=5 is defined AFTER should_auto_publish() (line 303 vs use at 297). It still works because should_auto_publish is called at runtime (not import-time evaluation), but cosmetically the constant should be moved above the function for readability.

server.py vs aggregator.py duplicate trust logic: _should_auto_publish (server.py) and should_auto_publish (aggregator.py) compute the same thing. Currently the source-of-truth at ingestion is aggregator.should_auto_publish; the server one is only used for the will_auto_publish flag exposed in the API. Single shared implementation would prevent future drift.

approve_draft/reject_draft increment approvals/rejections only if the source row exists (update_one with id filter, no upsert). If a draft's source was deleted, counters silently drop on the floor. Low-risk but worth a log warning.
AggregatorPanel.jsx is now 643 lines — past the 700-line soft limit will hit soon as more trust UI lands. Sources / EditDialog / TrustBadge would extract cleanly.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates ephemeral TEST_TrustSrc_* sources + TEST_TrustSeed drafts, then deletes them via try/finally. Post-run verified DB: only APSC + SLPRB sources remain, counters reset to 0/0, mode=auto, threshold=85. No leftover TEST_ data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 backend API coverage in /app/backend/tests/test_aggregator_trust_api.py (11 tests): TestSourceListTrustFields (2), TestValidation (3 — bad mode/threshold on create + update), TestApproveRejectCounters (3 — approve/reject/reset-trust), TestBulkCounters (2 — multi-source crediting), TestPublicHidesDrafts (1). UI verified via Playwright: Trust column visible with TrustBadge, ✓N/✗N counters, threshold hint, will_auto_publish green badge; Edit dialog persists agg-src-mode + agg-src-threshold; agg-source-reset-trust-{id} works with confirm and shows 'Trust reset' toast. Aggregator panel will need refactor if next P-tier adds more UI surface.
